summary: 1 3 The peak is situated in the Cleveland National Forest and is accessible by the Main Divide Road a fire road ; the Trabuco Canyon Trail, which begins near Trabuco Creek , and the Los Pinos Peak Trail, which begins in Hot Springs Canyon near San Juan Canyon, San Juan Creek and the Ortega Highway State Route 74
